meta.title: How to Build a Realistic AI Influencer - The ONLY Guide You Need
meta.description:
Learn How To Create AI Influencer with Higgsfield AI - Full Tutorial
Try Higgsfield AI  👉 https://higgsfield.ai?fpr=dankieft

AI Influencers are everywhere! In this video I break down how to make AI Influencers that look not only realistic but also are consistent in every shot. For this we're using Higgsfield Influencer studio In order to make good influencers you need to master 3 things: Prompting, Consistency & Motion, watch the entire video to understand how to make Realistic AI Influencers that can actually make you money with AI. 

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts & chat about AI
👉 https://www.skool.com/nextgenai

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
